overview: The todo-api has no dependencies and must be built first; the todo-web frontend depends on it, so it comes in phase 2. This bottom-up approach ensures the API contract is available before the UI integrates with it.

phases.name: Backend API
phases.description: Foundation service providing authentication and task/category CRUD with no dependencies.

components.name: todo-api
responsibilities: Provide signup/login endpoints issuing JWT tokens with bcrypt-hashed passwords
Offer CRUD endpoints for tasks and categories scoped to the authenticated user
Enforce authentication middleware and per-user data isolation with proper 401/403/404 responses
Expose /health endpoint and handle CORS preflight for the SPA
Maintain in-memory thread-safe storage of users, tasks, and categories
components.architectureContext: Core backend REST API on port 9090 consumed by the todo-web SPA over HTTPS using JWT bearer tokens. It is the single source of truth for user, task, and category data.
keyConsiderations: Use sync.RWMutex to guard in-memory maps against concurrent access
Sign JWTs with JWT_SECRET env var (default 'devsecret'), 24h expiry, subject=userId
Deleting a category must null categoryId on that user's tasks
Permissive CORS with Authorization header allowed; handle OPTIONS preflight
components.apiContract:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Todo API
  version: 1.0.0
servers:
  - url: /
paths:
  /health:
    get:
      summary: Health check
      responses:
        '200':
          description: OK
  /auth/signup:
    post:
      summary: Create a new user account
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/AuthRequest'
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/AuthResponse'
        '409':
          description: User exists
  /auth/login:
    post:
      summary: Log in
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/AuthRequest'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: OK
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/AuthResponse'
        '401':
          description: Invalid credentials
  /categories:
    get:
      summary: List categories for current user
      security: [{bearerAuth: []}]
      responses:
        '200':
          description: OK
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/Category'}
    post:
      summary: Create category
      security: [{bearerAuth: []}]
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                name: {type: string}
              required: [name]
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/Category'}
  /categories/{id}:
    delete:
      summary: Delete category
      security: [{bearerAuth: []}]
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: id
          required: true
          schema: {type: string}
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Deleted
  /tasks:
    get:
      summary: List tasks for current user
      security: [{bearerAuth: []}]
      parameters:
        - in: query
          name: categoryId
          schema: {type: string}
      responses:
        '200':
          description: OK
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/Task'}
    post:
      summary: Create task
      security: [{bearerAuth: []}]
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/TaskInput'}
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/Task'}
  /tasks/{id}:
    put:
      summary: Update task
      security: [{bearerAuth: []}]
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: id
          required: true
          schema: {type: string}
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/TaskInput'}
      responses:
        '200':
          description: OK
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/Task'}
        '404':
          description: Not found
    delete:
      summary: Delete task
      security: [{bearerAuth: []}]
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: id
          required: true
          schema: {type: string}
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Deleted
  /tasks/{id}/complete:
    post:
      summary: Toggle task completion
      security: [{bearerAuth: []}]
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: id
          required: true
          schema: {type: string}
        - in: query
          name: completed
          schema: {type: boolean}
      responses:
        '200':
          description: OK
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/Task'}
components:
  securitySchemes:
    bearerAuth:
      type: http
      scheme: bearer
  schemas:
    AuthRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        email: {type: string}
        password: {type: string}
      required: [email, password]
    AuthResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        token: {type: string}
        userId: {type: string}
    Category:
      type: object
      properties:
        id: {type: string}
        name: {type: string}
    TaskInput:
      type: object
      properties:
        title: {type: string}
        dueDate: {type: string, format: date-time, nullable: true}
        categoryId: {type: string, nullable: true}
        completed: {type: boolean}
      required: [title]
    Task:
      type: object
      properties:
        id: {type: string}
        title: {type: string}
        dueDate: {type: string, format: date-time, nullable: true}
        categoryId: {type: string, nullable: true}
        completed: {type: boolean}
        createdAt: {type: string, format: date-time}

phases.name: Frontend SPA
phases.description: React web app that consumes the backend API.

components.name: todo-web
responsibilities: Provide signup/login UI and persist JWT in localStorage
Render dashboard with category sidebar and task list with filters (All, Today, by category)
Support task CRUD including toggle-complete, edit modal, due date, and category assignment
Attach Authorization bearer header to API calls and redirect to login on 401
Serve /health via nginx and expose runtime-configurable VITE_API_URL
components.architectureContext: React SPA served by nginx on port 8080; communicates with todo-api over HTTPS using JWT bearer tokens and is the sole client of the API.
keyConsiderations: Inject VITE_API_URL at runtime via env.js template substituted by nginx entrypoint
Global fetch wrapper handling 401 by clearing token and redirecting to /login
SPA fallback to index.html in nginx.conf, with /health static 200 location
Multi-stage Dockerfile node:20-alpine build → nginx:alpine runtime on port 8080
Guard authenticated routes; do not render dashboard without a valid token
components.apiContract:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Todo Web
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /health:
    get:
      summary: Health check
      responses:
        '200':
          description: OK
